allow: Bash(python -m py_compile server.py dss/__init__.py dss/config.py dss/auth.py dss/mediamtx.py dss/nvr.py dss/handler.py scripts/generate_config.py)
Bash(py -3 -m py_compile server.py dss/__init__.py dss/config.py dss/auth.py dss/mediamtx.py dss/nvr.py dss/handler.py scripts/generate_config.py)
Bash(py -3 -c "from dss import auth, config, mediamtx, nvr; from dss.handler import Handler, DSSHTTPServer; print\('imports OK'\)")

PowerShell($bytes = [IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("$pwd\\start.ps1"\); $nonAscii = @\(\); for \($i=0; $i -lt $bytes.Length; $i++\) { if \($bytes[$i] -gt 127\) { $nonAscii += $i } }; if \($nonAscii.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host "Pure ASCII OK" } else { Write-Host \("Non-ASCII bytes at offsets: " + \($nonAscii -join ", "\)\) })
